objective: Extend the non-mutating governance consumer verifier so SSOT package v0.2 drift is reported for profiles, overrides, reusable workflow refs, and managed hook/content markers before downstream deployer mutation is broadened.
scope_boundary: Preserve existing v0.1 consumer verifier compatibility.
Document verifier output buckets and validation evidence.
out_of_scope: Changing GitHub rulesets or repository settings.
Weakening repo-specific HIPAA, plan-mode, local-worker, exemption, or product-baseline constraints.
research_summary: Existing verifier validates v0.1 consumer records, SHA pins, managed paths, and local-ci shim marker/ref. Issue #454 extends that read-only verifier with v0.2 profile/override/workflow/hook drift reporting while retaining v0.1 behavior.

sprints.name: Verifier v0.2 report-only drift
sprints.goal: Detect SSOT v0.2 consumer drift without mutating downstream repositories.
tasks: Add known-profile validation from manifest and desired-state profiles.
Add v0.2 profile constraint validation while preserving v0.1 records.
Add reusable workflow ref scanning for mutable governance refs.
Add managed hook marker and checksum drift checks.
Add local override metadata validation and observed_overrides output.
Add v0.2 profile entries to the consumer desired-state file.
Add focused tests and a real read-only LAM verifier proof.
acceptance_criteria: Verifier supports package v0.2 profile/override validation in report-only mode.
Verifier output clearly separates failures, warnings, and observed local overrides.
Existing v0.1 verifier behavior remains compatible.
Verifier can run against at least one local downstream checkout without mutating it.
Tests cover missing record, malformed record behavior, mutable workflow ref, missing profile, hook drift, invalid override metadata, HP profile weakening, and valid managed consumer.

specialist_reviews.focus: Current verifier, package manifest, desired-state profiles, downstream read-only observations, and local CI gate expectations.
specialist_reviews.summary: Explorer identified verifier extension points and confirmed the required report-only boundaries.

alternate_model_review.summary: Codex QA reviews the verifier behavior, focused tests, real LAM read-only proof, and no-downstream scope.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Implement governance-only report-only consumer verifier v0.2 drift checks for issue #454.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Run focused validation, Local CI Gate, closeout, PR, and automerge if green.
handoff_acceptance_criteria: v0.2 profile/override/workflow/hook drift is reported without mutation.
A local downstream checkout verifier proof is recorded.
Local CI Gate passes before merge.

material_deviation_rules: If downstream repos need propagation, create downstream issues instead of editing them here.
If Sonnet worker tooling is unavailable or repeatedly times out, record the deviation and continue with Codex implementation plus Codex QA.
If verifier identifies downstream drift, report it and defer remediation to issue-backed downstream work.
approved_by: operator approval: no HITL, loop remaining child issues
